description: Eval set for a generic startup financial modeling skill built around an economic kernel, driver tree, capital logic, and editable xlsx outputs.

evals.name: blank_memo_to_integrated_asset_heavy_model
evals.prompt: 現場向けAI機器を展開する資本集約型スタートアップのエクイティストーリーMarkdownを元に、資金調達向け5年収支計画をxlsxで作って。機器販売、利用料、保守、ソフトウェア、リース、製造原価、在庫、採用、資金調達、希薄化、KPI、投資家向けIC memoまで含めて。
evals.expected_output: Evidence-grounded integrated xlsx that starts from economic kernel, model grain, source map, and driver tree. Workbook includes operating engine, asset/capex logic, working capital where relevant, capital stack, ownership, scenarios, sensitivity, valuation, KPI, and memo surfaces.

assertions.text: Model begins with decision, model grain, entity scope, source facts, assumptions, and unknowns before sheet selection
Driver tree links units, price, utilization, capacity, manufacturing cost, working capital, capex, financing, and ownership
Critical assumptions include explanatory drivers, implied values, support ratios or variances, and evidence status

Workbook includes raw base-currency monetary values, correct non-monetary units, direct formulas, no workbook-scoped names, no merged cells, no frozen panes, no text wrapping, and hierarchy / indent columns that render as 20px in Google Sheets (about 2.14 xlsx width)
KPI reflects actual economics such as fleet, utilization, payback, gross margin, runway, burn multiple, capital efficiency, and deployment capacity
Valuation and funding logic tie to scenarios, cash runway, dilution, lease/debt capacity, and investor return rather than a generic revenue multiple only

IC memo is written from a clean decision-specific base, ignores legacy/backward-compatible memo layouts, and interprets KPI, downside triggers, valuation support, financing/dilution, and DD actions with only necessary and sufficient supplemental context
Generated defaults are labeled by evidence status and weak default assumptions are linked to scenario, benchmark refresh, or DD actions rather than presented as sourced facts

Any xlsx output follows the canonical workbook design tokens: Arial 10pt default/body font, semantic font colors, role-based alignment, Google-Sheets-safe column widths, compact row heights, no wrap/freeze/merge, rectangular semantic fill spans including member blank cells, sparse non-consecutive accents, clean print/canvas bounds, and raw-value number formats.

evals.name: seed_deeptech_milestone_financing
evals.prompt: 研究開発中のディープテック会社です。まだ売上はありません。PoC、量産試作、初号機納入、規制対応、採用、助成金、転換社債、次回ラウンド必要額を含む24か月の資金計画と、創業者・従業員・投資家の希薄化をExcelで見たいです。
evals.expected_output: Focused but integrated runway and financing workbook. Revenue metrics are not forced; milestone spend, hiring, grants, convertibles, cash runway, ownership waterfall, and next financing need are modeled explicitly.

assertions.text: Pre-revenue plan omits or labels non-useful revenue KPIs instead of forcing ARR or LTV/CAC
Runway is linked to hiring, milestone spend, capex, grants, convertibles, and next-round timing
Ownership waterfall traces founder, employee pool, convertible holders, new investors, and financing rounds to 100.00%
Scenario and sensitivity show delayed milestone, higher prototype cost, lower grant, and larger round cases
Weak or placeholder commercial assumptions are clearly labeled and carried into validation tests rather than treated as proven revenue drivers

Any xlsx output follows the canonical workbook design tokens: Arial 10pt default/body font, semantic font colors, role-based alignment, Google-Sheets-safe column widths, compact row heights, no wrap/freeze/merge, rectangular semantic fill spans including member blank cells, sparse non-consecutive accents, clean print/canvas bounds, and raw-value number formats.

evals.name: marketplace_growth_model
evals.prompt: Marketplaceスタートアップで、GMV、take rate、買い手/売り手コホート、決済手数料、販促費、チャーン、リピート率、営業人員、運転資本を含む3年モデルを作りたい。資金調達額の妥当性と投資家向け説明も含めて。
evals.expected_output: Marketplace-specific mechanics emerge from the driver tree: GMV, take rate, two-sided cohorts, liquidity, contribution margin, working capital, CAC/payback where meaningful, funding need, scenarios, and memo.

assertions.text: Revenue build derives net revenue from GMV and take rate, with buyer/seller cohorts and retention separated
Contribution margin includes payment fees, incentives, support, fraud/loss assumptions where relevant, and sales/marketing efficiency
Funding need ties to cash runway, growth investment, working capital, and downside scenario
The model does not import irrelevant software-only metrics unless they are explicitly tied to the marketplace economics
Scenario and sensitivity axes are selected from marketplace-specific uncertainties such as liquidity, take rate, incentives, repeat behavior, and working capital

Any xlsx output follows the canonical workbook design tokens: Arial 10pt default/body font, semantic font colors, role-based alignment, Google-Sheets-safe column widths, compact row heights, no wrap/freeze/merge, rectangular semantic fill spans including member blank cells, sparse non-consecutive accents, clean print/canvas bounds, and raw-value number formats.

evals.name: late_private_multi_segment_pre_ipo
evals.prompt: 上場前のスタートアップで、国内SaaS、海外SaaS、ハードウェア、保守、金融子会社があり、連結PL/BS/CF、NCI、税金、NOL、借入、リース、セカンダリー、IPO前後の希薄化、SOTP valuation、投資家向けDD論点を整理したい。
evals.expected_output: Late-private integrated workbook with multi-segment driver tree, consolidation logic, taxes, debt/lease/covenants, ownership, secondary, valuation, scenario, and DD memo surfaces.

assertions.text: Segments are modeled as economic units and consolidated with clear intercompany/NCI/tax handling where needed
Capital stack includes debt, lease, equity, secondary, covenants, cash uses, and investor ownership effects
Valuation supports DCF, exit multiple, comparables, SOTP, and investor return logic with scenario linkage
DD memo highlights source facts, assumptions, unresolved diligence questions, and sensitivity drivers
Valuation explains method credibility and exclusions across DCF, multiples, SOTP, IPO support, and investor return rather than averaging every method blindly
Investor return view includes ownership, dilution, MOIC, IRR when timing matters, net debt or preference effects where relevant, and downside breakpoints

Any xlsx output follows the canonical workbook design tokens: Arial 10pt default/body font, semantic font colors, role-based alignment, Google-Sheets-safe column widths, compact row heights, no wrap/freeze/merge, rectangular semantic fill spans including member blank cells, sparse non-consecutive accents, clean print/canvas bounds, and raw-value number formats.

evals.name: focused_pricing_and_roi_module
evals.prompt: 新しいAIプロダクトの価格を決めたい。顧客ROI、導入工数、粗利、サポート負荷、従量課金、契約期間、解約リスク、営業サイクル、値上げ余地を含めて、価格帯と投資家向け説明をExcelで作って。
evals.expected_output: Focused pricing workbook that stays compact but includes customer ROI, pricing ladder, gross margin, payback, capacity/load implications, revenue sensitivity, and investment narrative.

assertions.text: Artifact remains focused on pricing while including the upstream/downstream calculations needed for the decision
Customer ROI, willingness-to-pay, cost-to-serve, support load, gross margin, selected price, and pricing support ratio are linked by formulas
Assumptions use units and raw base-currency monetary values correctly, with no parenthetical unit labels or hidden scale conversions
Memo explains recommended price range, risk, validation tests, and investor-facing rationale
The selected price is supported by independent primitives, while dependent outputs such as revenue and margin are formulas or checks

Any xlsx output follows the canonical workbook design tokens: Arial 10pt default/body font, semantic font colors, role-based alignment, Google-Sheets-safe column widths, compact row heights, no wrap/freeze/merge, rectangular semantic fill spans including member blank cells, sparse non-consecutive accents, clean print/canvas bounds, and raw-value number formats.

evals.name: fintech_balance_sheet_model
evals.prompt: Fintech lending startupのモデルを作りたい。融資実行額、貸倒、回収、資金調達コスト、warehouse line、規制資本、営業人員、運転資本、希薄化、downside case、投資家向けKPIとIC memoを含めてください。
evals.expected_output: Generic fintech/balance-sheet model whose assumptions start from origination, credit loss, collection, funding cost, capital constraints, and covenant or warehouse capacity rather than software ARR defaults.

assertions.text: Where lending, regulatory, or warehouse mechanics are evidenced, the driver tree separates origination, loss rate, collection timing, funding cost, regulatory capital, and warehouse/debt capacity
KPI selection includes credit quality, funding spread, capital adequacy, runway, and covenant or warehouse headroom where relevant rather than importing software defaults
Scenarios coherently pressure the evidenced balance-sheet drivers, such as loss rate, funding availability, collection timing, and capital constraints
Memo states evidence gaps and DD questions around credit performance, funding terms, regulation, and downside liquidity

Any xlsx output follows the canonical workbook design tokens: Arial 10pt default/body font, semantic font colors, role-based alignment, Google-Sheets-safe column widths, compact row heights, no wrap/freeze/merge, rectangular semantic fill spans including member blank cells, sparse non-consecutive accents, clean print/canvas bounds, and raw-value number formats.

evals.name: ambiguous_generic_startup_memo
evals.prompt: 事業概要だけが曖昧なスタートアップメモから、まず投資判断に必要な収支モデルの設計とAssumption registerを作って。まだ業態は決め打ちしないで、必要ならxlsxではなくmd/csvでもよいです。
evals.expected_output: Non-overfit model spec or assumption register that identifies decision, unknowns, candidate mechanics, independent drivers, evidence gaps, and validation plan before forcing a workbook.

assertions.text: The response does not force hardware, SaaS, marketplace, or any other mechanic without evidence
Variable selection ranks candidate drivers by decision relevance, impact, evidence weakness, controllability, time variability, and investor scrutiny
Assumption register separates source facts, selected assumptions, explanatory drivers, checks, dependent formulas, and decision outputs
Output shape is the smallest complete artifact rather than a forced full workbook

Any xlsx output follows the canonical workbook design tokens: Arial 10pt default/body font, semantic font colors, role-based alignment, Google-Sheets-safe column widths, compact row heights, no wrap/freeze/merge, rectangular semantic fill spans including member blank cells, sparse non-consecutive accents, clean print/canvas bounds, and raw-value number formats.

evals.name: existing_workbook_repair_visible_readability
evals.prompt: 既存のstartup financial model xlsxを監査して修正してください。文字が見切れる、空白セルがオーバーフローを止める、単位列の配置がバラバラ、ハイライトが多すぎる、ソースがfakeっぽい、KPI/IC memoが浅いです。
evals.expected_output: Audit and repair report or patched workbook with concrete sheet/cell findings, visible readability fixes, source hygiene fixes, and deeper analysis guidance for KPI and memo surfaces.

assertions.text: Findings cite concrete sheet/cell locations and distinguish style blockers from formula/modeling issues
Blank cells intended for overflow remain genuinely blank and unstyled after repair

Hierarchy / indent columns render as 20px in Google Sheets (about 2.14 xlsx width), with no native Excel indent, no leading-space indentation, no frozen panes, and no generated text wrapping; any user-approved wrapping or manual line-break exception has row height matched exactly to visible line count
Sheet canvases and print areas stop at the real used range, with no styled trailing rows or columns that create extra rendered pages

Borders and background fills form a calm repeated design system instead of noisy isolated cell decoration; semantic rows and section headers use rectangular column-consistent spans chosen from the attached table/block, intentionally fill blank cells inside that span, and never repeat the same non-heatmap fill or heavy border pattern across consecutive rows without a structural reason
Charts, drawings, and newly inserted rows or cells remain inside an editable rendered canvas without inheriting noisy blank styles
Source fields use traceable sources or evidence status and avoid fake assumptions/analysis labels
KPI and memo gaps are repaired or translated into explicit decision interpretation and DD questions

Any xlsx output follows the canonical workbook design tokens: Arial 10pt default/body font, semantic font colors, role-based alignment, Google-Sheets-safe column widths, compact row heights, no wrap/freeze/merge, rectangular semantic fill spans including member blank cells, sparse non-consecutive accents, clean print/canvas bounds, and raw-value number formats.

evals.name: weak_evidence_pricing_register
evals.prompt: 価格設定の根拠がまだ弱いAIサービスです。顧客ROI、業務削減時間、支払意思、サポート負荷、粗利、解約リスク、営業サイクルを使って、まずAssumption registerと検証計画を作ってください。
evals.expected_output: Focused assumption register and validation plan that deepens weak pricing evidence without bloating into a full company workbook.

assertions.text: Selected price is decomposed into independent value, willingness-to-pay, cost floor, margin, support load, and retention-risk primitives
Evidence strength controls decomposition depth and weak assumptions are carried into validation tests
Sensitivity axes are chosen from pricing uncertainty and decision impact, not from a fixed default grid
Artifact remains focused and does not force irrelevant full three-statement sheets

Any xlsx output follows the canonical workbook design tokens: Arial 10pt default/body font, semantic font colors, role-based alignment, Google-Sheets-safe column widths, compact row heights, no wrap/freeze/merge, rectangular semantic fill spans including member blank cells, sparse non-consecutive accents, clean print/canvas bounds, and raw-value number formats.

evals.name: misleading_label_hybrid_startup
evals.prompt: AI SaaSと呼んでいるが、実態はハードウェア導入、保守、リース、利用料が混ざるスタートアップです。資金調達向けモデルを作ってください。
evals.expected_output: Hybrid driver model that composes recurring, asset, service, lease, and deployment-capacity mechanics from primitives rather than forcing a pure SaaS template.

assertions.text: The model selects economic units from evidenced revenue/cost/capital flows instead of the SaaS label alone
KPI and scenario axes include deployment capacity, utilization, service burden, capex or lease availability, and runway where relevant
Valuation and memo explain why SaaS multiples alone are insufficient if hardware/service economics drive risk

Any xlsx output follows the canonical workbook design tokens: Arial 10pt default/body font, semantic font colors, role-based alignment, Google-Sheets-safe column widths, compact row heights, no wrap/freeze/merge, rectangular semantic fill spans including member blank cells, sparse non-consecutive accents, clean print/canvas bounds, and raw-value number formats.

trigger_eval_queries_should_trigger: このエクイティストーリーMarkdownを元に、現場向けAI機器を展開する資本集約型スタートアップの資金調達に向けた収支計画を作成してください。startup-financial-modelingスキルを使用してください。
まだ売上のない研究開発スタートアップです。24か月の資金繰り、助成金、転換社債、次回ラウンド、希薄化をExcelで見たいです。
MarketplaceのGMV、take rate、買い手/売り手コホート、販促費、運転資本、投資家向け説明を含むモデルを作ってください。
J-KISS 2.0 と Series A の転換、option pool、founder dilution、downside round を含むcap tableをExcelで出して。
上場前の複数事業スタートアップについて、連結三表、借入、リース、税金、SOTP valuation、セカンダリー、IPO前後の希薄化を見たい。
AIプロダクトの価格設定モデルを作りたい。顧客ROI、粗利、従量課金、営業サイクル、値上げ余地も含めて。
venture debt と equity round のtrade-offを runway、covenant、dilution、investor return の観点で比較したい。
founder secondary を含むM&A exit waterfallと税後手取り、投資家リターンを見たい。
Fintech lending startupの融資実行額、貸倒、資金調達コスト、warehouse line、規制資本を含むモデルを作って。
曖昧な事業メモから、業態を決め打ちせずにAssumption registerとモデル設計を作って。
既存のstartup financial model xlsxで文字見切れ、空白セル、単位列、KPI/IC memoの浅さを監査して修正して。
価格根拠が弱いAIサービスのAssumption registerと検証計画を作って。
trigger_eval_queries_should_not_trigger: 競合SaaS上場企業の直近決算を読んで、business modelの文章解説だけしてほしい。
個人事業主の家計簿をExcelでまとめたい。確定申告用の経費仕訳が中心です。
上場企業の10-KからARRとNRRを抽出してCSVにまとめて。モデル化は不要です。
Series Aのterm sheet雛形が欲しい。数値計算はいりません。
VC向けpitch deckを10枚で作りたい。financialsは1枚の要約だけで十分です。
TAM/SAM/SOMの市場規模算定だけ知りたい。財務モデルは別で作ります。
M&Aのvirtual data roomのフォルダ構成とDD checklistが欲しい。モデル本体は不要です。
Cap table管理SaaSの比較をしてください。価格と機能の説明だけでいいです。
notes: The core regression is generic composition from economic kernel and driver tree.
Maturity, sector, and funding context are evidence fields, not template selectors.

All xlsx outputs should preserve raw base-currency money storage, unit integrity, no text wrapping, exact line-count row heights for approved wrap/line-break exceptions, no frozen panes, Google-Sheets-20px hierarchy / indent columns, sparse rectangular semantic fill/border spans aligned to attached row components, direct formulas, and editable workbook structure.

Prompt guidance must force assumption epistemology, KPI interpretation, coherent scenarios, valuation method credibility, clean-base memo writing, benchmark/source hygiene, and self-inspection before completion.

Model creation is not completion: agents must verify both model logic and sheet design with command-based workbook checks plus rendered-output inspection, then fix and rerun until both are sufficient or a real blocker is documented.
Examples, maturity cues, sectors, and modes are pattern prompts only; evals should reject fixed stage-sector-purpose routing and keyword-triggered metric packs.
